headline: This FormFactor Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 3 Upgrades For Friday
summary: Wall Street analysts upgraded EDU, MKTX, and FORM stocks. Check out their ratings on Benzinga's analyst ratings page before buying EDU.

headline: B of A Securities Upgrades MarketAxess Holdings to Neutral, Maintains Price Target to $170
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Eli Abboud   upgrades MarketAxess Holdings (NASDAQ:MKTX) from Underperform to Neutral and maintains the price target from $170 to $170.
